items.task_input: 用费曼视角帮我看看这个解释是不是只是在背概念
items.expected_behavior: Match Feynman aliases, load feynman-perspective, and use the perspective as a reasoning lens.
items.rubric: The response must route to feynman-perspective rather than inventing a generic explanation style.

items.task_input: 我想找一个能帮助城市更新评审的视角
items.expected_behavior: Recommend two or three relevant urban, design, or evaluation perspectives from INDEX.md when no exact person is named.
items.rubric: The response must recommend candidates instead of pretending a single named perspective was requested.

items.task_input: 我不需要费曼视角了，帮我停用它
items.expected_behavior: Route to skill-factory and follow perspective retirement protocol rather than deleting directly.
items.rubric: The response must route retirement to skill-factory and must not archive/delete directly from perspective-library.

items.task_input: 用一个我这里没有的人物视角分析这个商业策略
items.expected_behavior: If the requested perspective does not exist, route to skill-factory to create it instead of inventing the person's view.
items.rubric: The response must not invent a missing specific person's perspective.
